description: Input schema for Kling v2.0 Master Image-to-Video.

prompt.description: The text prompt describing the desired motion and action for the video.
examples: The woman slowly turns her head and smiles at the camera
prompt.title: Prompt

image.description: Starting frame image to animate. Supported formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP.
image.title: Image

duration.description: Duration of the video in seconds (5 or 10).

cfg_scale.description: Classifier-free guidance scale. Controls how closely the video follows the prompt.
cfg_scale.title: Cfg Scale

negative_prompt.description: Negative prompt to guide generation away from unwanted content.
negative_prompt.title: Negative Prompt

title: AppInput
